case_title: ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC VS. ARMANDO PARDO et al

docket_entries.description: SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF ARROW FINANCIAL SERVICES, LLC

THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING APR-14-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
